title: AssertionJudgeVerdicts
description: Output of the Stage-3 assertion-intent judge (Step 8, shadow mode). One verdict per generated test function, judged on two orthogonal dimensions: (1) does its assertion set logically verify a derivative of the test title + the methods it calls, pinned to the Step-4 oracle; (2) does it execute every act-phase choreography step from the code-modification-plan, in order, before asserting?

test.description: Test function name (or file::name) this verdict is about.

verifies_intent.description: True iff the assertions would FAIL if the product regressed on the behaviour the test's title + called methods imply.

binds_oracle.description: True iff at least one assertion checks the Step-4 pinned expected value/element (not an incidental/unrelated assertion).

sequence_complete.description: True iff every act-phase choreography step from the code-modification-plan for this test function is called, in ascending order, before the test's assertions. False if a required act step is skipped, reordered, or never called. Trivially true when the plan declared no choreography for this test function.

missing_steps.description: One entry per act-phase choreography step that is missing or out of order, phrased as '<Pom>.<method> (order <n>) never called' or '... called out of order'. Empty/omitted when sequence_complete is true.

reasoning.description: One or two sentences justifying the verdict, citing the specific assertion/oracle.
